index.title: Public pages
index.description: Configure subscription pages, preview public URLs, and share the archive and RSS feed.
index.emptyMessage: Create your first subscription page to let visitors join one of your lists.
index.subscriptionPagesDescription: Active pages are reachable at the public URL below; inactive pages show a "not available" message to visitors.
index.shareUrlsDescription: Copy these to share with subscribers, embed in your site, or point a feed reader at.

forbidden.title: You do not have access
forbidden.description: You need the subscription_pages:manage permission to view this page.

notFound.title: Subscription page not found
notFound.description: This page may have been deleted, or you may have followed an old link.

edit.selectListError: Select at least one list to subscribe visitors to.

basics.title: Basics
basics.description: The page's identity on the public URL and what visitors see.
basics.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Appears in the public URL.
basics.active: Active — visible to visitors at the public URL

boundLists.title: Bound lists
boundLists.description: A confirmed subscriber will be added to every list selected here.
boundLists.empty: No lists yet. Create a list first.

fields.title: Fields
fields.description: Email is always shown and always required. Pick from your subscriber-fields registry to add more — the same list the visual editor's merge-tag picker uses. Manage the registry under Settings → Subscriber fields.
fields.noCustomFields: No custom subscriber fields yet — add one under Settings → Subscriber fields to surface it here.

confirmationEmail.title: Confirmation email
confirmationEmail.description: The double-opt-in confirmation email is sent from this verified sending domain.
confirmationEmail.fromLocalPartHint: The portion before the @ in the From address.
